$schema_note: 1bit-systems release feed. Consumed by `1bit update --check` and `1bit update --install`. Schema: see crates/1bit-cli/src/update.rs (Feed/Release/Artifact). Publish verbatim at https://1bit.systems/releases.json.

releases.notes: First AppImage drop — bundles the Rust binaries (1bit, 1bit-helm, 1bit-halo-helm-tray, 1bit-mcp-kickstarter + 15 more; ~32 MB zstd-squashfs). Requires glibc >= 2.35 and Linux kernel 6.x. ROCm is NOT bundled; install via ./install.sh on the host before `1bit install core`. Model weight (halo-1bit-2b.h1b, ~1.8 GB) is a separate asset. NPU smoke logs bundled for reference.

$sample_warning_old: The 0.3.0 entry is SAMPLE data from the Gap-P1-#15 scaffold pass — artifact URL is a placeholder, sha256 + minisign_sig match the test fixture at crates/1bit-cli/tests/fixtures/update/sample_artifact.bin, NOT a real release AppImage. The 0.1.0 entry is the real AppImage artifact built by packaging/appimage/build-appimage.sh on 2026-04-23 (size 33,237,496 bytes, sha256 matches the sidecar at packaging/appimage/dist/1bit-systems-0.1.0-x86_64.AppImage.sha256). URLs point at the GitHub release (bong-water-water-bong/1bit-systems v0.1.0) to be cut 2026-04-24; old `1bit.systems/dl/` mirror path is retired. `minisign_sig` stays empty until the signing flow lands. The `halo-1bit-2b.h1b` model weight and the three `npu-smoke-*.log` bundles are listed as release assets but are not yet on disk at write time — sha256 for the h1b is taken from the release bundle plan; refresh from a real sidecar before tagging. `latest` stays 0.3.0 so the update-check regression test keeps working; flip to 0.1.0 once the sample fixture is removed.
$sample_warning: 0.3.0 sample fixture removed 2026-04-25 — flipped latest to real 0.1.0 AppImage. Restore with the old warning text from the v0.1.x releases when running update-check regression tests.
